subject: [PATCH v9 01/15] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to use this feature independently of NUMA balancing. The six supported architectures now select CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE and CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING depends on it. No functional change is made, as the same set of architectures continues to have working protnone support.
